# assets.icons { #app.assets.icons }

`assets.icons`

UI Asset Icon Library Module.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

| Name                 | Type          | Description                                                                                                                       |
|----------------------|---------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| question_circle_fill | shiny.ui.HTML | Bootstrap question-circle-fill inline SVG icon wrapper element used  extensively to trigger info tooltips on application headers. |
